ENTRY.name: VILLAGE
ENTRY.STRING:
Extends your {National Borders}.
Allows you to construct economic buildings in the area.
Creates {Citizens} to build and gather.
Provides an income of +$NUMBER1 #ICON2 and +$NUMBER0 #ICON1.

ENTRY.name: VILLAGEBUILD
ENTRY.STRING: If the Build City button is greyed out, you need to do more #ICON25 {Civic} research at the Library.

ENTRY.name: CITY
ENTRY.STRING:
Stronger and less vulnerable than Small Cities.
Extends your {National Borders}.
Allows you to construct economic buildings in the area.
Creates {Citizens} to build and gather.
Provides an income of +$NUMBER1 #ICON2 and +$NUMBER0 #ICON1. Adds hit points to all buildings in the City's economic radius.

ENTRY.name: CITYBUILD
ENTRY.STRING: Your Small City will automatically upgrade to a Large City when you have built at least five different kinds of buildings in it and reached the #ICON23 Classical Age.

ENTRY.name: METROPOLIS
ENTRY.STRING:
Stronger and less vulnerable than Large Cities.
Extends your {National Borders}.
Allows you to construct economic buildings in the area.
Creates {Citizens} to build and gather.
Provides an income of +$NUMBER1 #ICON2 and +$NUMBER0 #ICON1. Adds hit points to all buildings in the City's economic radius.

ENTRY.name: METROPOLISBUILD
ENTRY.STRING: Your Large City will automatically upgrade to a Major City when you have built at least nine different kinds of buildings in it and reached the #ICON26 Enlightenment Age.

ENTRY.name: FARM
ENTRY.STRING: One Citizen per Farm can gather #ICON1 {Food}.

ENTRY.name: FARMV
ENTRY.STRING:
There is a maximum of $NUMBER0 farms allowed per City.
#ICON1 Food output can be enhanced by building a {Granary} in the same City.

ENTRY.name: WOODCUTTER
ENTRY.STRING:
Build near {trees} to gather #ICON2 {Timber}.
The more Citizens working at a camp, the faster you accumulate #ICON2 Timber.

ENTRY.name: WOODCUTTERV
ENTRY.STRING:
The more trees nearby, the more Citizens can work at the camp.
#ICON2 Timber output can be enhanced by building {Lumber Mills} in your cities.

ENTRY.name: MINE
ENTRY.STRING:
Build Mines near {mountains} and {cliffs} to gather #ICON5 {Metal}.
The more Citizens working at a Mine, the faster you accumulate #ICON5 Metal.

ENTRY.name: MINEV
ENTRY.STRING:
The bigger the mountain or cliff, the more Citizens can work the Mine.
#ICON5 Metal output can be enhanced by building {Smelters} in your cities.

ENTRY.name: GRANARY
ENTRY.STRING: Increases the #ICON1 {Food} output of all {Farms} in the same City by $NUMBER0%.

ENTRY.name: LUMBERMILL
ENTRY.STRING: Increases the #ICON2 {Timber} output of all Woodcutter's Camps in the same City by $NUMBER0%.

ENTRY.name: SMELTER
ENTRY.STRING: Increases the #ICON5 {Metal} output of all Mines in the same City by $NUMBER0%.

ENTRY.name: POWERPLANT
ENTRY.STRING:
Increases the #ICON6 {Oil} output of all Oil Wells in your nation by $NUMBER0%.
Additional Refineries within your nation have a cumulative "stacking" effect, so two Refineries would increase your #ICON6 Oil output by a net $NUMBER1%.

ENTRY.name: BARRACKS
ENTRY.STRING: Creates foot soldiers to attack your enemies.

ENTRY.name: BARRACKSV
ENTRY.STRING: Garrison foot soldiers inside to heal them.

ENTRY.name: STABLE
ENTRY.STRING: Creates mounted soldiers to attack your enemies.

ENTRY.name: STABLEV
ENTRY.STRING: Garrison mounted units inside to heal them.

ENTRY.name: AUTOPLANT
ENTRY.STRING: Creates Tanks, Armored Cars, and other vehicle units.

ENTRY.name: AUTOPLANTV
ENTRY.STRING:
Garrison vehicles inside to repair them.
Auto Plants replace Stables.

ENTRY.name: SIEGEFACTORY
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates Siege units to attack enemy buildings.
Creates Supply Wagons to support your armies.

ENTRY.name: SIEGEFACTORYV
ENTRY.STRING: Garrison Siege units inside to repair them.

ENTRY.name: FACTORY
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates Artillery units to attack enemy buildings and troops.
Creates Anti-Aircraft units to shoot down enemy aircraft.
Creates Supply Trucks to support your armies.

ENTRY.name: FACTORYV
ENTRY.STRING:
Garrison Artillery units inside to repair them.
Factories replace Siege Factories.

ENTRY.name: DOCK
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates fishing ships and military naval ships.
Garrison ships here to repair and protect them.

ENTRY.name: ANCHORAGE
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates fishing ships and military naval ships.
Garrison ships here to repair and protect them.

ENTRY.name: SHIPYARD
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates fishing ships and military naval ships.
Garrison ships here to repair and protect them.

ENTRY.name: OILPLATFORM
ENTRY.STRING: Gathers #ICON6 {Oil} from the sea.

ENTRY.name: OILWELL
ENTRY.STRING:
One Citizen per Oil Well can gather #ICON6 {Oil}.
Must be placed where #ICON6 Oil is visible on the map.
Can be placed either on {land} or {sea}.

ENTRY.name: LIBRARY
ENTRY.STRING: Conducts research including Age advances.

ENTRY.name: LIBRARYV
ENTRY.STRING: NOTE: If your nation has multiple libraries you will be able conduct multiple researches at the same time. This takes place automatically, even if you queue up all the research at a single one of your libraries.

ENTRY.name: UNIVERSITY
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates {Scholars} who gather #ICON4 {Knowledge}.
The more Scholars studying here, the faster you accumulate #ICON4 Knowledge.
#ICON4 Knowledge can then be spent on research at a Library.

ENTRY.name: UNIVERSITYV
ENTRY.STRING: Each University can support up to 7 Scholars.

ENTRY.name: MARKET
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates {Caravans} who collect #ICON3 {Wealth}.
Creates {Merchants} who can control {rare resources}.
Provides an income of +$NUMBER0 #ICON3 Wealth.

ENTRY.name: MARKETV
ENTRY.STRING: Allows the {buying} and {selling} of common resources (with #ICON26 level 2 Commerce).

ENTRY.name: TEMPLE
ENTRY.STRING:
Expands the City's influence on {National Borders} by +$NUMBER0.
Increases the City's Hit Points by +$NUMBER1%.
Increases the City's Attack Range by +$NUMBER2.

ENTRY.name: SENATE
ENTRY.STRING: If built at any other city besides your capital, changes that city to your new capital.Senates allow you to research systems of government.Select between totalitarian and democratic govermental systems to gain different benefits.

ENTRY.name: SENATEV
ENTRY.STRING: Also receive a unique General, the Patriot, with each form of government.The Patriot returns to the Senate (after a delay) when killed. If your Senate is captured, the Patriot will return at a nearby city.You may only have one Senate at a time; you must first raze the old one (this takes a long time!) before building a new one, which will move your Capital to the new city.

ENTRY.name: TOWER
ENTRY.STRING:
Small cheap fortification.
Automatically attacks enemies.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: KEEP
ENTRY.STRING:
Small, cheap fortification.
Automatically attacks enemies.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: STOCKADE
ENTRY.STRING:
Small, cheap fortification.
Automatically attacks enemies.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: BUNKER
ENTRY.STRING:
Small, cheap fortification.
Automatically attack enemies.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: FORT
ENTRY.STRING:
Protects an area by attacking enemy units.
Influences {National Borders}.
Creates Spies and Generals.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: CASTLE
ENTRY.STRING:
Protects an area by attacking enemy units.
Influences {National Borders}.
Creates Spies and Generals.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: FORTRESS
ENTRY.STRING:
Protects an area by attacking enemy units.
Influences {National Borders}.
Creates Spies and Generals.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: REDOUBT
ENTRY.STRING:
Protects an area by attacking enemy units.
Influences {National Borders}.
Creates Spies and Generals.
Can be garrisoned with friendly troops.
Units garrisoned inside will slowly heal.

ENTRY.name: AIRBASE
ENTRY.STRING: Creates aircraft from Biplanes and Fighters to Attack Helicopters and Strategic Bombers.

ENTRY.name: AIRBASEV
ENTRY.STRING: Aircraft can return here to be repaired and refueled.

ENTRY.name: LOOKOUT
ENTRY.STRING:
Defenseless but can see a long way.
Detects hidden enemy units nearby.
Limited ability to shoot arrows at enemy aircraft passing nearby.

ENTRY.name: OBSERVATIONPOST
ENTRY.STRING:
Defenseless, but can see a long way.
Detects hidden enemy units nearby.
Limited ability to shoot arrows at enemy aircraft passing nearby.

ENTRY.name: AIRDEFENSEGUN
ENTRY.STRING:
Fires at enemy aircraft.
Detects hidden enemy units nearby.

ENTRY.name: RADARAIRDEFENSE
ENTRY.STRING:
Fires at enemy aircraft.
Detects hidden enemy units nearby.

ENTRY.name: SAMINSTALLATION
ENTRY.STRING:
Fires at enemy aircraft.
Detects hidden enemy units nearby.

ENTRY.name: NUCLEARSILO
ENTRY.STRING:
Creates and launches missile units.
Researches new types of missiles, including Nuclear Missiles and ICBM's.
Can only hold one missile at a time.

ENTRY.name: PYRAMIDS
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your #ICON21 Commerce Limit for Food and Wealth by $NUMBER1.
Increases your #ICON22 City Limit by $NUMBER2. Cities are 33% cheaper.
Improves your #ICON1 Food gather rate by $NUMBER3%.

ENTRY.name: COLOSSUS
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your #ICON3 Wealth rate by $NUMBER1%.
Increases your #ICON20 Population Limit by $NUMBER2.
Increases your #ICON21 Commerce Limit for Wealth and Timber by $NUMBER4.

ENTRY.name: HANGINGGARDENS
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your Knowledge production by $NUMBER1.
Granary, Lumber Mill, and Smelter production upgrades are discounted by 66%.

ENTRY.name: TERRACOTTAARMY
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Creates a free foot unit every $NUMBER2 seconds (plus $STRING3 second(s) for every infantry unit you control).

ENTRY.name: TERRACOTTAARMYCTW
ENTRY.STRING: Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s). Gives you an extra reinforcement army in every Conquest battle. If present in a battle, creates a free foot unit every $NUMBER2 seconds (plus $NUMBER3 second(s) for every infantry unit you control).

ENTRY.name: COLOSSEUM
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your National Borders by $NUMBER1.
Attrition to enemy units in your territory increased by $NUMBER2%.
Forts and Towers are $NUMBER5% cheaper.

ENTRY.name: FORBIDDENCITY
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s). Counts as a bonus Major City in your nation. Can be built wherever a City can and its build location is not revealed to the enemy until it is completed.
Gives +50 #ICON1 Food and #ICON2 Timber instead of the usual +10/+10.
Capital timers do not affect you.

ENTRY.name: FORBIDDENCITYCTW
ENTRY.STRING: Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s). When present in a Conquer the World battle, capital timers and sudden death elimination do not affect you. When held in your empire but not present in the current battle, doubles your own capital timer and halves enemy capital timers.

ENTRY.name: TIKAL
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your #ICON2 Timber gather rate by $NUMBER1%.
Raises your #ICON21 Commerce Cap for #ICON2 Timber by $NUMBER3.
Increases Temple effects (on National Borders, Hit Points, and Attack Range) by $NUMBER4%.

ENTRY.name: PORCELAIN
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
You create ships $NUMBER1% faster.
Increases your income from rare resources (in your territory) and Markets by $NUMBER2%
You receive the bonus ability of all rare resources in your territory, even if you don't have a Merchant there.

ENTRY.name: REDFORT
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Massive Fort with long range, many hit points, extra garrison value, increased border push, and resistance to air attack. Can be built wherever a Fort can; does not count against a city's Wonder limit. Its build location is not revealed to the enemy until it is completed.
Receive Fort upgrades for free and all Forts gain 33% more hit points. Units garrisoned in any Fort heal at +$NUMBER1% the normal rate.

ENTRY.name: REDFORTCTW
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s). Massive Fort with long range and many hit points.Has extra garrison value, increased border push, and resistance to air attack. Can be built wherever a Fort can; does not count against a city's Wonder limit. Its build location is not revealed to the enemy until it is completed.
Receive Fort upgrades for free and all Forts gain 33% more hit points. Units garrisoned in any Fort heal at +$NUMBER1% the normal rate.

ENTRY.name: ANGKORWAT
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your #ICON5 Metal gather rate by $NUMBER2%.
Raises your #ICON21 Commerce Limit for #ICON5 Metal by $NUMBER4.
Cost of Barracks, Stable, and Dock units reduced by $NUMBER3%.

ENTRY.name: VERSAILLES
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Reduces the non-Knowledge costs of Library research by $NUMBER1%.
Your Supply Wagons can heal your troops (and French Supply Wagons heal at double normal rate).
Siege, Artillery, and Supply units move $NUMBER4% faster.

ENTRY.name: TAJMAHAL
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases all your building hit points by $NUMBER1%.
Your #ICON3 Wealth income increased by $NUMBER2%.
Raises your #ICON21 Commerce Limit for #ICON3 Wealth by $NUMBER3.

ENTRY.name: KREMLIN
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Raises your #ICON21 Commerce Limit for #ICON1 Food, #ICON2 Timber, #ICON5 Metal, and #ICON6 Oil by $NUMBER1. Increases the attrition damage inflicted on unsupplied enemy units in your territory by $NUMBER2%. Spies are created instantly. Gain the use of an extra Spy unit which does not count against your Population Limit and is rebuilt for free whenever it is killed.

ENTRY.name: STATUEOFLIBERTY
ENTRY.STRING: Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s). You receive all ground unit and Airbase upgrades for free.Reduces attrition damage inflicted on your units in enemy territory by $NUMBER2%. Reduces the cost of Bombers and air defense buildings by $NUMBER3%.

ENTRY.name: EIFFELTOWER
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
Increases your #ICON6 Oil income by $NUMBER1%.
Raises your #ICON21 Commerce Limit for #ICON6 Oil by $NUMBER3.
Increases your National Borders by $NUMBER2.

ENTRY.name: SUPERCOLLIDER
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
The cost to buy goods at the Market is never higher than $NUMBER1 #ICON3 Wealth; the price to sell is never lower than $NUMBER2 #ICON3 Wealth. Technologies can be researched instantaneously (but not unit technologies).

ENTRY.name: SPACEPROGRAM
ENTRY.STRING:
Wonder of the World: $STRING0 wonder point(s).
You can see the location of all units, buildings, and terrain on the map.
You create aircraft and missiles $NUMBER3% faster and $NUMBER4% cheaper. You are immune to the effects of a Nuclear Embargo.
